case_title: MELISSA LILLIAN TOMPKINS VS. ARLETTE PEREZ

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,747.00 FILED BY TOMPKINS, MELISSA LILLIAN AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, ARLETTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-12-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-12-2016 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, AFTER MATTER WAS HEARD, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-12-2016 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOMPKINS, MELISSA LILLIAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PEREZ, ARLETTE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
